site.name: GOLEADOR
home.title: Home
home.inspire: Sport is more than competition: it is discipline, courage, and that pure moment when the whole stand breathes as one. Every sprint, every pass, and every goal tells a story about who you can become if you refuse to quit.
home.inspire2: Football teaches us to lift our heads after mistakes, to celebrate wins with humility, and to respect the team more than ego. Follow your heroes on the pitch — and on GOLEADOR.
home.hubLead: Open trusted portals in one click — feel the atmosphere in the visuals, then read their full coverage on their sites.
home.localBody: GOLEADOR articles about Messi, Ronaldo, Mbappé and more live in the Blog. The gallery is a carousel with football-ball controls. Welcome to the stands!
gallery.title: Star gallery
gallery.carouselIntro: Swipe with the arrows — the controls look like footballs.
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Write to us with content ideas or fan-page collaborations.
blog.title: Articles & news
auth.registered: Account created. You can sign in as a fan.
auth.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
auth.adminReserved: This email is reserved for the site administrator.
login.hint: A single administrator account manages articles. Fans get a personal account without the admin panel.
signup.name: Fan / display name
signup.note: Sign-up creates a fan account. Only the admin can edit the blog.
forbidden.lead: You do not have administrator rights. The panel is for the official account only.
account.title: My account
account.lead: You are signed in as a GOLEADOR fan.
loader.line: Warming up the pitch… the ball is getting ready.
